---
title: "Wilhelmina Martha James"
---

## Wilhelmina Martha James

**Dates:** (1845?-1932)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1874)

### Biography

Eldest daughter of the Rector of Kirkhaugh, Northumberland, novelist as Austin Clare, contributed tracts and fiction to SPCK, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1874).  The postcard to her enigmatic. [LG]

### Letters

- Letter from [23 July 1873]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
